name: cascade-boilerplate
description: Development discipline framework for Cascade/Windsurf IDE

scripts.test:unit: echo 'Add your unit test command here'
scripts.test:integration: echo 'Add your integration test command here'
scripts.test:e2e: echo 'Add your E2E test command here'
scripts.pre-commit: npm run lint && npm run test:unit
scripts.pre-push: npm run test && npm run test:coverage
scripts.quality:check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage
scripts.quality:fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
